---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new detector, flag, or capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the data-quality issue or workflow gap this addresses.
(e.g. "I can't tell which columns have inconsistent casing.")

**Proposed solution**
How you'd like it to work. If it changes the CLI, note the new flag; if it
changes the report schema, note the new field(s); if it's an API change,
note the new endpoint or parameter.

**Alternatives considered**
Other ways to solve the same problem, and why you'd prefer this one.

**Additional context**
Example data, mockups, or links to similar features in other tools, if
helpful.
